tagline: Describe it, watch it build, refine it live

highlights.title: Describe to Diagram
highlights.description: Type what you need in natural language — flowcharts, architecture, ER diagrams, network topology — and watch professional diagrams appear.

highlights.title: Live Streaming
highlights.description: Diagrams build in real-time as AI generates them. Shapes and connections appear one by one with smooth fade-in.

highlights.title: Select & Refine
highlights.description: Click any element to select it, hover to preview. AI knows which component you picked — refine through conversation.
